{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager",
  "description": "Aura Wellness is a luxurious blend of spa treatments and wellness services center designed to refresh the body, calm the mind, and restore inner balance. We are located in Lekki 1, Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Lekki 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Develop and implement social media strategies aligned with the spa&rsquo;s brand and marketing goals
	Create, schedule, and publish engaging content across platforms such as Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, X,
	Capture and edit photos/videos of treatments, facilities, products, promotions, and client experiences
	Manage daily social media interactions, including responding to comments, messages, and reviews professionally
	Plan and execute promotional campaigns, giveaways, influencer collaborations, and wellness events
	Monitor social media trends, competitor activities, and audience preferences to improve engagement
	Track performance metrics and prepare monthly reports on reach, engagement, and campaign effectiveness
	Collaborate with therapists, management, and marketing teams to promote services and special offers
	Maintain brand consistency in tone, visuals, and messaging
	Assist with online reputation management and customer relationship building.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified applicants should send their CV to: aurawellnessng@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-15",

  },

Social Media Manager Job at Aura Wellness




        
    

        
        Aura Wellness is a luxurious blend of spa treatments and wellness services center designed to refresh the body, calm the mind, and restore inner balance. We are located in Lekki 1, Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Lekki 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop and implement social media strategies aligned with the spa’s brand and marketing goals
	Create, schedule, and publish engaging content across platforms such as Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, X,
	Capture and edit photos/videos of treatments, facilities, products, promotions, and client experiences
	Manage daily social media interactions, including responding to comments, messages, and reviews professionally
	Plan and execute promotional campaigns, giveaways, influencer collaborations, and wellness events
	Monitor social media trends, competitor activities, and audience preferences to improve engagement
	Track performance metrics and prepare monthly reports on reach, engagement, and campaign effectiveness
	Collaborate with therapists, management, and marketing teams to promote services and special offers
	Maintain brand consistency in tone, visuals, and messaging
	Assist with online reputation management and customer relationship building.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified applicants should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Security Officer",
  "description": "HOP Services Limited is a Hospitality Solutions and Cleaning Company who strive to deliver high quality service to our clients within the hotel industry, domestic and commercial sector. We apply our vast experience of over 10years to achieve this goal.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Security Officer&nbsp;

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Part-time

About the Role


	We are seeking a disciplined, alert, and experienced Senior Security Officer to safeguard our facilities, staff, and guests on a 24-hour rotational shift basis.
	The ideal candidate that brings professionalism, integrity, and a strong sense of duty to everything they do.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor and control access to company premises, ensuring only authorized personnel and guests are admitted.
	Conduct regular patrols of all assigned areas &mdash; interior and exterior &mdash; throughout the 24-hour shift cycle.
	Respond promptly and appropriately to security incidents, emergencies, alarms, and disturbances.
	Maintain accurate shift logs, incident reports, and handover notes for each duty period.
	Enforce company policies regarding restricted areas, visitor management, and safety protocols.
	Liaise with local law enforcement agencies when necessary and escalate security threats through the appropriate chain of command.
	Support the coordination of safety procedures during events, guest check-ins, and VIP visits.
	Report maintenance issues, safety hazards, or suspicious activities to management immediately.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Minimum of OND/SSCE; a diploma in Security Management or a related field is an added advantage.
	Minimum of 3&ndash;5 years of experience in a security role, preferably in a hospitality or service-oriented environment. Proven prior experience in the hospitality industry is required.
	Proven prior experience in the hospitality industry is required.
	Strong knowledge of security protocols, access control, and emergency response procedures.
	Physically fit and able to remain alert throughout a 24-hour shift rotation.
	Excellent observation, communication, and report-writing skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team under pressure.
	Must be of sound character with no criminal record.


Application Requirement:


	Valid government-issued ID (National ID, Voter&#39;s Card, or International Passport).
	At least two verifiable professional references from previous employers.
	Updated CV/Resume detailing relevant work experience.


&nbsp;Salary
N70,000 - N90,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should Send their CV, valid ID, and two references to: precious.chinonso@hopservicesltd.com using &quot;Senior Security Officer &ndash; Port Harcourt&quot; as the subjeect of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-24",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "HOP Services"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Rivers (PH)",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "199471"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 30000,
      "maxValue": 75000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Senior Security Officer Job at HOP Services Limited




        
    

        
        HOP Services Limited is a Hospitality Solutions and Cleaning Company who strive to deliver high quality service to our clients within the hotel industry, domestic and commercial sector. We apply our vast experience of over 10years to achieve this goal.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Security Officer 

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Part-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a disciplined, alert, and experienced Senior Security Officer to safeguard our facilities, staff, and guests on a 24-hour rotational shift basis.
	The ideal candidate that brings professionalism, integrity, and a strong sense of duty to everything they do.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor and control access to company premises, ensuring only authorized personnel and guests are admitted.
	Conduct regular patrols of all assigned areas — interior and exterior — throughout the 24-hour shift cycle.
	Respond promptly and appropriately to security incidents, emergencies, alarms, and disturbances.
	Maintain accurate shift logs, incident reports, and handover notes for each duty period.
	Enforce company policies regarding restricted areas, visitor management, and safety protocols.
	Liaise with local law enforcement agencies when necessary and escalate security threats through the appropriate chain of command.
	Support the coordination of safety procedures during events, guest check-ins, and VIP visits.
	Report maintenance issues, safety hazards, or suspicious activities to management immediately.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Minimum of OND/SSCE; a diploma in Security Management or a related field is an added advantage.
	Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in a security role, preferably in a hospitality or service-oriented environment. Proven prior experience in the hospitality industry is required.
	Proven prior experience in the hospitality industry is required.
	Strong knowledge of security protocols, access control, and emergency response procedures.
	Physically fit and able to remain alert throughout a 24-hour shift rotation.
	Excellent observation, communication, and report-writing skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team under pressure.
	Must be of sound character with no criminal record.


Application Requirement:


	Valid government-issued ID (National ID, Voter's Card, or International Passport).
	At least two verifiable professional references from previous employers.
	Updated CV/Resume detailing relevant work experience.


 Salary
N70,000 - N90,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should Send their CV, valid ID, and two references to: [email protected] using "Senior Security Officer – Port Harcourt" as the subjeect of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Visa Officer (Education & Tourism)",
  "description": "Negxy Concept Limited is an international, educational and consulting agency in Nigeria that aims at fulfilling the desires of students with the intentions to study abroad.

We are partners with more than 1,000 reputable universities from 5 countries (Australia, Canada, UK, Ireland and USA) and since the year 2013, our experienced consultants have assisted over 5,000 students, ensuring they have a stress-free application process based on their interests, academic records and the best offers available for them.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Visa Officer (Education &amp; Tourism)
Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and experienced Visa Advisor to join our dynamic team.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for providing professional advice and assistance to clients in the visa application process, ensuring that all applications meet the relevant requirements and are submitted in a timely manner.


Key Responsibilities


	Deliver excellent customer service to visa applicants, handling all inquiries professionally and within service level agreements.
	Receive, process, and oversee all visa requests from clients and the outgoing department, ensuring smooth operations.
	Inform clients of required documents, review them thoroughly, and verify accuracy before submission.
	Complete visa applications, schedule embassy appointments and interviews, and submit passports and applications to embassies/consulates.
	Provide regular follow-ups on all inquiries and monitor visa cases on Salesforce, managing appointments, special requests, amendments, and cancellations.
	Proactively monitor changes to visa regulations, update clients on evolving immigration laws and processes, and ensure compliance with agreements.
	Build and maintain relationships with clients and key stakeholders, collaborating with internal teams to address client needs.
	Achieve defined Service Level Agreements and Key Performance Indicator goals, adhering to company policies and procedures.
	Advise clients on visa rules, processes, and handle travel documentation efficiently.
	Refer potential leads to the sales team and follow up on progress.


Requirements


	Proven experience in visa processing and consultation.
	Strong knowledge of visa regulations for the UK, USA, Canada, Ireland, Australia, and Schengen Countries.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	High attention to detail and strong organizational abilities.
	Ability to handle multiple applications simultaneously and meet deadlines.
	Proficiency in using office software and applications.


Benefits of Working with Us


	Opportunity to work with Nigeria&rsquo;s leading educational consulting agency.
	Exposure to international educational systems and visa regulations.
	Professional development and continuous learning opportunities.
	Collaborative and supportive work environment.
	Competitive salary and performance-based incentives.
	Opportunity to make a positive impact on students&#39; lives and career paths.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: hr@negxylimited.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Visa Officer (Education & Tourism) Job at Negxy Concept Limited




        
    

        
        Negxy Concept Limited is an international, educational and consulting agency in Nigeria that aims at fulfilling the desires of students with the intentions to study abroad.

We are partners with more than 1,000 reputable universities from 5 countries (Australia, Canada, UK, Ireland and USA) and since the year 2013, our experienced consultants have assisted over 5,000 students, ensuring they have a stress-free application process based on their interests, academic records and the best offers available for them.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Visa Officer (Education & Tourism)
Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented and experienced Visa Advisor to join our dynamic team.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for providing professional advice and assistance to clients in the visa application process, ensuring that all applications meet the relevant requirements and are submitted in a timely manner.


Key Responsibilities


	Deliver excellent customer service to visa applicants, handling all inquiries professionally and within service level agreements.
	Receive, process, and oversee all visa requests from clients and the outgoing department, ensuring smooth operations.
	Inform clients of required documents, review them thoroughly, and verify accuracy before submission.
	Complete visa applications, schedule embassy appointments and interviews, and submit passports and applications to embassies/consulates.
	Provide regular follow-ups on all inquiries and monitor visa cases on Salesforce, managing appointments, special requests, amendments, and cancellations.
	Proactively monitor changes to visa regulations, update clients on evolving immigration laws and processes, and ensure compliance with agreements.
	Build and maintain relationships with clients and key stakeholders, collaborating with internal teams to address client needs.
	Achieve defined Service Level Agreements and Key Performance Indicator goals, adhering to company policies and procedures.
	Advise clients on visa rules, processes, and handle travel documentation efficiently.
	Refer potential leads to the sales team and follow up on progress.


Requirements


	Proven experience in visa processing and consultation.
	Strong knowledge of visa regulations for the UK, USA, Canada, Ireland, Australia, and Schengen Countries.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	High attention to detail and strong organizational abilities.
	Ability to handle multiple applications simultaneously and meet deadlines.
	Proficiency in using office software and applications.


Benefits of Working with Us


	Opportunity to work with Nigeria’s leading educational consulting agency.
	Exposure to international educational systems and visa regulations.
	Professional development and continuous learning opportunities.
	Collaborative and supportive work environment.
	Competitive salary and performance-based incentives.
	Opportunity to make a positive impact on students' lives and career paths.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Supply Chain Manager",
  "description": "Animal Care Services Konsult Nigeria Limited - We are Animal Care Service Konsult Nigeria Limited, an agro-allied company specializing in livestock farming, feed milling, technical laboratory services, and the marketing of animal health products. Committed to animal health and production, we strive to be the leading operator in Nigeria&#39;s livestock industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Supply Chain Manager

Job Location: Ogere, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Manage the sourcing and supply of all feed production raw materials, poultry drugs, vaccines, and related operational materials.
	Develop and maintain strong relationships with suppliers, manufacturers, and vendors to ensure quality and timely delivery.
	Coordinate procurement activities and negotiate favorable pricing and supply terms.
	Monitor inventory levels to ensure adequate stock availability while minimizing wastage and stock-outs.
	Oversee warehousing, storage, and distribution processes for feed materials, medications, and vaccines.
	Ensure proper handling and storage conditions for poultry drugs and vaccines in compliance with regulatory standards.
	Coordinate logistics and transportation to support smooth operational activities across farms and production units.
	Track market trends and supply chain risks affecting feed ingredients and poultry health products.
	Prepare supply chain reports, procurement analyses, and inventory performance updates.
	Collaborate with production, veterinary, finance, and operations teams to ensure seamless operations.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: oawolesi@animalcare-ng.com using &quot;Supply Chain Manager&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Supply Chain Manager Job at Animal Care Services Konsult Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Animal Care Services Konsult Nigeria Limited - We are Animal Care Service Konsult Nigeria Limited, an agro-allied company specializing in livestock farming, feed milling, technical laboratory services, and the marketing of animal health products. Committed to animal health and production, we strive to be the leading operator in Nigeria's livestock industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Supply Chain Manager

Job Location: Ogere, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage the sourcing and supply of all feed production raw materials, poultry drugs, vaccines, and related operational materials.
	Develop and maintain strong relationships with suppliers, manufacturers, and vendors to ensure quality and timely delivery.
	Coordinate procurement activities and negotiate favorable pricing and supply terms.
	Monitor inventory levels to ensure adequate stock availability while minimizing wastage and stock-outs.
	Oversee warehousing, storage, and distribution processes for feed materials, medications, and vaccines.
	Ensure proper handling and storage conditions for poultry drugs and vaccines in compliance with regulatory standards.
	Coordinate logistics and transportation to support smooth operational activities across farms and production units.
	Track market trends and supply chain risks affecting feed ingredients and poultry health products.
	Prepare supply chain reports, procurement analyses, and inventory performance updates.
	Collaborate with production, veterinary, finance, and operations teams to ensure seamless operations.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Supply Chain Manager" as the subject of the email.
